properties.titulo_evento: Art biennial Manifesta revives Germany's postwar churches
properties.descricao: Following the destruction of World War II, around 1,000 new churches were built in Germany's Ruhr region. Today, many stand empty, but the contemporary art show Manifesta is giving them a new lease on life.
